# Phase-20 — Capstone & Career

> Integrate everything into capstone platforms and role-readiness.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 71-73**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Capstone: Enterprise Data Platform](01_Capstone_Enterprise_Data_Platform.prompt.md) | `Capstone_Enterprise_Data_Platform.md` | 90 min + 12h |
| 02 | [Capstone: Enterprise AI Platform](02_Capstone_Enterprise_AI_Platform.prompt.md) | `Capstone_Enterprise_AI_Platform.md` | 90 min + 12h |
| 03 | [System Design Interview Prep](03_System_Design_Interview_Prep.prompt.md) | `System_Design_Interview_Prep.md` | 60 min + 6h |
| 04 | [Architecture Interview Prep](04_Architecture_Interview_Prep.prompt.md) | `Architecture_Interview_Prep.md` | 60 min + 6h |
| 05 | [Staff and Principal Promotion](05_Staff_and_Principal_Promotion.prompt.md) | `Staff_Principal_Promotion.md` | 45 min + 3h |
| 06 | [Portfolio and Case Studies](06_Portfolio_and_Case_Studies.prompt.md) | `Portfolio_and_Case_Studies.md` | 45 min + 4h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
